examples: The Optimum Synthesis Condition and antimycotic ability ofp-dioxanone were investigated.
The subject of the lectures was broad-spectrum antimicrobial and antimycotic drugs, I was this close to falling asleep. Maybe this cardigan is too warm and comfy.
Antimycotic activity of bifonazole was studied in susceptibility tests with 35 strains of medically common fungi representing 9 species using the disc diffusion method.
